brand.name: CADD Truck Parking
brand.oneLiner: we provide safe and secure truck parking in the permian basin
brand.wordsUse: safe, secure, clean, organized, big rigs, tractor trailer, best value, best bang for the buck, only lot in the permian with our amenities

request.idea: to welcome any and all truck drivers, owner operators, and fleet managers to come park with us where they will find a brotherhood and a safe and secure place that will provide a peaceful rest for you and your rig, mention the call to action which is to reserve now just go to our website at caddtruckparking.com
request.specialInstructions: end with the logo and mention that we speak spanish by using this phrase, "y no te olvides que tambien hablamos espanol"
